title: Audio statement: call to retaliate against Russia
dateDisplay: ~October 2015 (recorded as 2015-10-12 in candidate file; not verified)
dateStatus: Needs review — event and publication dates recorded as 2015-10-12 in candidate file; not independently verified in this research pass; the specific date should be treated as approximate until primary source verification is completed
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: An audio statement attributed to Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra, recorded in the candidate file with dates of approximately October 2015 (listed as 2015-10-12; not independently verified). The statement is described as containing a call to retaliate against Russian forces, in the context of Russia's military entry into Syria, which began on 30 September 2015. The date, distribution channel, and primary audio source have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This audio statement is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is an attributed statement in the context of Russia's entry into the Syrian conflict in autumn 2015. The date (recorded as 2015-10-12 in the candidate file but not independently verified), primary audio source, distribution channel, and content all require verification. No transcript has been located. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
